name: generate_music
description: Generate a music clip from a text prompt via Gemini Lyria 3 Clip. Generation step — produces a file on disk; composition happens at render time.

output.description: Path to the generated music clip (plus duration metadata when --json)

params.name: prompt
params.description: Text description of the music (genre, mood, instrumentation, BPM)

params.name: model
params.description: Override the Lyria model (default: lyria-3-clip-preview, ~30s clips)

params.name: with-vocals
params.description: Allow vocals in the output. Omit (default) for instrumental-only — recommended for background music under narration.
